name: Zain Ul Abdin
title: Geographic Information Systems (GIS) Analyst | Assistant Manager (GIS)
summary: GIS Expert with 6+ years of experience in geospatial analysis, cartography, and full-stack Web GIS development. Skilled in building interactive mapping systems, dashboards, and spatial data pipelines using React, Mapbox, Node.js, and PostGIS. Experienced in transforming complex spatial datasets into scalable web applications and decision-support tools across multiple industries.

education.degree: Master of Science in Remote Sensing & Geo-Information Science
subjects: Big Geospatial Data Analysis using Google Earth Engine (GEE)
Advanced Remote Sensing and Digital Image Processing
Spatial Thinking Monitoring and Mapping Natural Resources

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Space Science
subjects: GIS Customization and Programming with Python

responsibilities: Performed cartographic map design using QGIS, ensuring clear symbology, labeling, and map layouts for geospatial datasets.
Conducted onscreen digitization of roads, administrative boundaries, and land features from satellite imagery.
Cleaned and structured vector datasets by correcting topology errors and validating geometry.
Created thematic maps for project reports using appropriate projections and classification methods.
Converted raster maps into vector layers through manual digitization for GIS analysis.
Organized and maintained attribute tables for digitized features to ensure accurate spatial data records.
Assisted in georeferencing scanned maps to align them with real-world coordinate systems.
Exported finalized cartographic layouts and GIS layers for internal reports and presentations.
Developed custom QGIS plugins tailored to meet specific requirements of telecom clients using Python and PyQGIS.
Built the main GIS data visualization dashboard in QGIS using Python for comprehensive spatial data insights.
Automated the data fetching process, replicating Azenqos (AZM file) functionality by integrating SQLite with Python GIS libraries.
Implemented PyQGIS scripts to automate geospatial data processing and reduce repetitive GIS workflows.
Designed custom map tools and UI components within QGIS plugins using Python and Qt Designer.
Integrated spatial datasets from multiple sources (CSV, GeoJSON, Shapefiles, SQLite) for telecom network analysis.
Optimized spatial queries and map rendering performance in QGIS for handling large telecom datasets.
Processed and validated telecom network spatial data including towers, coverage areas, and infrastructure layers.
Implemented data validation and error handling within plugins to ensure data integrity during processing.
Prepared technical documentation and testing procedures for developed plugins before client deployment.
Automated the complete zoning map QA workflow using Python with core GIS libraries such as Rasterio, Shapely, and Fiona within QGIS.
Conducted daily quality assurance checks on zoning datasets to ensure spatial accuracy and regulatory compliance.
Performed high-precision digitization of zoning boundaries from municipal zoning documents and maps.
Converted scanned zoning maps into structured GIS datasets for analysis and client delivery.
Validated geometry, topology, and attribute data to maintain consistent zoning data standards.
Automated zoning data processing scripts to accelerate map validation and reduce manual errors.
Produced standardized zoning layers and map outputs for large-scale urban planning datasets.
Delivered zoning datasets for major clients including Google, Zillow, Redfin, Realtor.com, and Estately through Zoneomics.
Maintained GIS data integrity and version control across large zoning databases.
Assisted in resolving zoning classification conflicts during the QA and validation process.
Documented QA procedures and workflow improvements for the internal GIS team.
Trained newly recruited GIS analysts on zoning digitization, QA standards, and internal GIS tools.
Developed GIS-based analytical solutions to solve complex spatial problems across geospatial and remote sensing datasets.
Automated GIS workflows and spatial data processing using Python to improve efficiency and reduce manual processing time.
Deployed and maintained GIS web applications for spatial data visualization and analysis.
Designed and implemented a Brown Planthopper (BPH) disease detection methodology using remote sensing techniques.
Developed the complete BPH detection pipeline in Python, automating data acquisition, processing, and result generation.
Deployed the BPH detection system on GitHub and AWS to enable scalable and accessible execution.
Built a real-time pixel-level crop disease detection model using NDVI for accurate identification of infected agricultural zones.
Optimized and automated the biomass detection model, significantly improving processing speed for AgromAI workflows.
Applied geospatial analysis, remote sensing, and programming expertise to develop scalable agricultural intelligence solutions.
